sentences.arabic: اللُّغَةُ الْعَرَبِيَّةُ لُغَةٌ غَنِيَّةٌ بِالْمُفْرَدَاتِ وَالْمَعَانِي.
sentences.translation: Arapski jezik je jezik bogat rječnikom i značenjima.
sentences.translationEn: The Arabic language is a language rich in vocabulary and meanings.

sentences.arabic: كُلُّ كَلِمَةٍ لَهَا أَصْلٌ وَجَذْرٌ لُغَوِيٌّ وَاضِحٌ.
sentences.translation: Svaka riječ ima jasan lingvistički korijen i porijeklo.
sentences.translationEn: Every word has a clear linguistic root and origin.

sentences.arabic: يَدْرُسُ الطُّلَّابُ قَوَاعِدَ النَّحْوِ لِكِتَابَةِ جُمَلٍ صَحِيحَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Studenti uče pravila gramatike kako bi pisali ispravne rečenice.
sentences.translationEn: Students study grammar rules to write correct sentences.

sentences.arabic: جَمَالُ الْفُصْحَى يَظْهَرُ فِي الْقُرْآنِ الْكَرِيمِ وَالْأَدَبِ.
sentences.translation: Ljepota književnog jezika (Fusha) se pojavljuje u Časnom Kur'anu i književnosti.
sentences.translationEn: The beauty of Fusha appears in the Holy Quran and literature.

sentences.arabic: نَحْنُ نُحِبُّ تَعَلُّمَ هَذِهِ اللُّغَةِ الْعَرِيقَةِ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Volimo učiti ovaj drevni jezik svaki dan.
sentences.translationEn: We love learning this ancient language every day.
